ses.configurationset.guardianoptions.Cfn: Settings for your VDM configuration as applicable to the Guardian.

ses.configurationset.guardianoptions.Opt.Description: Specifies the status of your VDM optimized shared delivery. Can be one of the following:  + `ENABLED` – Amazon SES enables optimized shared delivery for the configuration set.+ `DISABLED` – Amazon SES disables optimized shared delivery for the configuration set.
